name: Pulumi
description: Monitor Pulumi infrastructure-as-code stacks for cloud infrastructure compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Pulumi Cloud at https://app.pulumi.com
2. Go to Account → Access Tokens
3. Create a new token
4. Enter it below

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Pulumi stacks for IaC infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Pulumi has separate stacks for different environments
